title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Starmer's strongest defence was the division of his opponents. But Streetings letter showed the right and the left of the party are now coalescing around a process. That suggests it's basically game over. 

inews.co.u...
items.content_text:
